name: Yakisoba
recipeIngredient: 3/4 Pound boneless inexpensive steak (semi-frozen), 3/4 to 1 pound
2 Packages Birds Eye frozen Japanese or Chinese style vegetables
3 Packages Ramen noodles, broken into thirds (about 3-4)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the semi-frozen steak into thin bite-sized pieces.
2. Stir-fry the steak over medium heat until thoroughly browned.
3. Bring 2 quarts of water to a rapid boil while stir-frying the meat.
4. Add 1 to 2 seasoning packets from the noodles to the steak.
5. Add the Ramen noodles to the boiling water and cook for 3 minutes.
6. While cooking the noodles, add the vegetables and soy sauce to taste to the steak, stirring until thoroughly heated.
7. Once the noodles are done, drain them and add to the steak and vegetable mixture.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Note: Chicken, pork, or shrimp can be substituted for steak.
